message:
fix(c_interop): Fix numpy test_ctypeslib segfault (11/11 tests pass)

Fixes multiple issues causing segfault in test_ctypeslib:

1. Fix PyModuleDef use-after-free in createProxyModule and PyImport_AddModule
   - Heap allocate PyModuleDef instead of stack to avoid dangling pointer

2. Fix internal submodule access in getAttrViaSubprocess
   - Add importlib.import_module() fallback for internal submodules like
     numpy._core._multiarray_tests that require direct import

3. Fix isSubprocessProxy using wrong unicode module
   - Use objects/unicodeobject.zig (handles CPython layout) instead of
     include/unicodeobject.zig (internal layout mismatch)

4. Add pointer validation in PyValue.from
   - Validate ob_type and tp_name pointers before accessing to prevent
     segfaults on corrupted proxy objects

5. Replace unsafe .? with orelse @panic in codegen
   - Safer null handling with clear error messages for C extension calls

All 11 numpy tests now pass (100%).
